product_overview: A FastAPI-based platform to register directory baselines and perform asynchronous integrity scans across factory assets using dirhash, with Oracle-backed persistence and audit trails.
core_goals: Provide baseline management for factory software/configuration to define gold standards.
Detect and report unauthorized drift or corruption via high-performance directory hashing.
Run large-scale, non-blocking integrity scans as background tasks.
Persist audit logs and results in Oracle for enterprise traceability and compliance.

features.name: Factory Integrity Management
features.description: Manage baselines for factory assets and run asynchronous integrity scans; store and retrieve scan results and audit trails.
user_flows: POST /baselines/ with valid baseline payload (name, path, metadata) -> Receive 200 with Baseline including id -> GET /baselines/ -> Receive 200 with list of Baseline[] including created baseline
POST /baselines/ with missing required fields -> Receive 400 with validation error
GET /baselines/ when database unavailable -> Receive 500 with error payload

POST /baselines/{baseline_id}/scan with existing baseline_id -> Receive 200 with task_id and queued status -> GET /scans/?baseline_id={baseline_id} -> Receive 200 with ScanResult[] containing the task_id and status (running/complete)
POST /baselines/{baseline_id}/scan with non-existent baseline_id -> Receive 404 with baseline not found error
GET /scans/ -> Receive 200 with ScanResult[] (paginated) showing historical scan results and statuses
GET /scans/?invalid_param=xyz -> Receive 400 with query parameter validation error

features.name: Factory Integrity Management
features.description: Register baselines and scan directories for integrity.

endpoints.description: Create a new baseline for a factory asset
Trigger a background integrity scan for a baseline
